name: Blast Buddies
author: Poki
description: Blast Buddies is a multiplayer shooter where you team up with friends or go solo across free-for-all and team deathmatch modes. Pick your main weapon, sidearm, and ability before each match, then blast through destructible environments. Build and share custom maps, climb the leaderboards, and deck out your character with unlockable skins. Party up with friends and find servers to jump into. Who will top the scoreboard? How do I play Blast Buddies? Move: WASD or Arrow keys Jump: Spacebar Slide: C Reload: R Primary Weapon: 1 Secondary Weapon: 2 Special Ability: Shift or 3 Leaderboard: Tab Pause: Escape Use your mouse to aim and shoot! Who created Blast Buddies? Blast Buddies is created by Blasters. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Blast Buddies for free? You can play Blast Buddies for free on Poki. Can I play Blast Buddies on mobile devices and desktop? Blast Buddies can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Blast Buddies with my friend? Yes! Blast Buddies is a multiplayer game so you can play online with your friends!
